allow: Bash(mdls -name kMDItemVersion /Applications/Playgrounds.app 2>/dev/null || echo "未找到 Swift Playgrounds")
Bash(swift --version 2>/dev/null && xcode-select -p 2>/dev/null || echo "未安装 Swift 工具链")
Bash(mdfind "kMDItemFSName == 'Swift Playgrounds.app'" 2>/dev/null; ls /Applications/ | grep -i play; find /Applications -maxdepth 2 -name "*.app" 2>/dev/null | grep -i play)
